name: Circuit Border
description: Rounded corners and a window border textured as a hex circuit, with bright data pulses travelling around the band over a dim base grid. The cells flicker faintly and the whole band dims when the surface loses focus. Width, corner radius, hex size, pulse count, pulse speed and the two colours are this pack's own parameters.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Corner radius
parameters.description: Roundness of the corners (px, 0 for square)

parameters.name: Pulse count
parameters.description: How many data pulses travel the band at once

parameters.name: Pulse speed
parameters.description: How many times per second each pulse travels around the border

parameters.name: Grid colour
parameters.description: Colour of the dim base circuit grid

parameters.name: Pulse colour
parameters.description: Colour of the travelling data pulses
